name: Monarch Tractor
relevance: MK-V driver-optional autonomous electric tractor plus WingspanAI; vineyard/orchard sim plus synthetic row-crop data feed the autonomy and analytics stack.
note: electric autonomous tractor and farm management platform

name: Burro
relevance: Outdoor mobile robots tow, haul, mow, and patrol in nurseries, vineyards, and orchards; outdoor sim plus synthetic terrain and obstacle data feed multi-task autonomy.
note: autonomous outdoor mobile robots (Augean Robotics) for agriculture and grounds

name: Cartken
relevance: Camera-only autonomous delivery and industrial transport robots; mixed indoor/outdoor sim plus synthetic perception data feed the camera-only stack.
note: camera-based autonomous delivery and industrial material-transport robots

name: Ati Motors
relevance: Sherpa factory AMRs with a self-driving-car-style autonomy stack; factory-floor sim plus synthetic pallet and aisle data feed perception and policy training.
note: autonomous mobile robots (tugs, pallet movers) for manufacturers

name: Matic
relevance: Camera-only home vacuum/mop running on-device networks; home-room sim plus synthetic floor and clutter imagery feed the perception stack.
note: camera-only consumer home vacuum and mop robot

name: Outrider
relevance: Autonomous electric yard trucks hitch, move, and disconnect trailers; yard sim plus synthetic trailer and glad-hand data feed manipulation and driving policies.
note: autonomous electric yard trucks for distribution yards

name: Corvus Robotics
relevance: Infrastructure-free indoor drones scan warehouse barcodes including lights-out; warehouse-aisle sim plus synthetic barcode and scene data feed the autonomy.

name: Four Growers
relevance: GR-100 detects ripeness and harvests greenhouse tomatoes and cucumbers; greenhouse sim plus synthetic crop-ripeness data feed perception and policy training.

name: Neros
relevance: Low-cost FPV recon/strike drones with a China-free supply chain; aerial sim plus synthetic recon and strike scenarios are central to mass-trained pilots and policies.
note: low-cost FPV reconnaissance and strike drones for defense

name: Deep Robotics
relevance: Industrial quadrupeds for inspection plus the DR02 all-weather humanoid; legged-locomotion sim plus synthetic site data feed policy training across forms.
note: industrial quadruped robots and DR02 humanoid

name: LimX Dynamics
relevance: Modular humanoid and bipedal robots aimed at logistics and industrial tasks; full-body humanoid sim plus behavior-cloning trajectories are central to policy training.
note: modular humanoid and bipedal robots for logistics and industry

name: Booster Robotics
relevance: Low-cost humanoids sold as developer platforms (RoboCup AdultSize 2025 champion stack); humanoid sim plus open behavior-cloning data feed the researcher community.

name: EngineAI
relevance: RL-trained dynamic-gait humanoids and bipeds at mass-production scale; legged sim plus large synthetic locomotion datasets are central to RL policy training.
note: agile RL-trained humanoid and bipedal robots
